h1. Configuration Inventory

h2. Global Environment
|| Key || Value ||
| AWS Account | `111122223333` |
| Region | `us-east-1` |
| Directory Name | `workspaces-platform.local` |
| Directory ID | `d-0000000000` |
| Pool Directory ID | `d-0000000000` |
| Name Prefix | `workspaces-platform-pilot` |

h2. Backend Configuration
|| Key || Value ||
| S3 Bucket | `workspaces-platform-terraform-state` |
| DynamoDB Table | `workspaces-platform-pilot-terraform-locks` |
| KMS Alias | `alias/workspaces-platform-pilot-terraform-state-01` |
| Region | `us-east-1` |

h2. Network Configuration
|| Key || Value ||
| VPC ID | `vpc-00000000000000000` |
| Subnet ID A | `subnet-00000000000000000` |
| Subnet ID C | `subnet-00000000000000001` |
| Subnet CIDR A | `10.164.98.128/25` |
| Subnet CIDR C | `10.164.99.0/25` |
| Trusted CIDR | `10.164.0.0/16` |

h2. Bundle Inventory
|| Tier || Bundle Name || Bundle ID ||
| Standard | `workspaces-platform-pilot-stndrd-bundle-v2` | `wsb-00000000` |
| SOC | `workspaces-platform-pilot-soc-bundle-v1` | `wsb-00000001` |
| Dev | `workspaces-platform-pilot-dev-4xlarge-v1` | `wsb-00000002` |

h2. Pool Inventory
|| Pool Type || Pool Name || State Key ||
| Standard | `workspaces-platform-pilot-stndrd-pool-v1` | `workspaces/platform/us-east-1/standard-pool.tfstate` |
| SOC | `workspaces-platform-pilot-soc-pool-v1` | `workspaces/platform/us-east-1/soc-pool.tfstate` |
| Dev | `workspaces-platform-pilot-dev-pool-v1` | `workspaces/platform/us-east-1/dev-pool.tfstate` |

h2. Secrets and Sensitive Values
* SAML metadata ARN is required per pool Terragrunt unit via `saml_xml_secret_arn`.
* SAML metadata content should be stored in AWS Secrets Manager only.
* No credentials or SAML XML should be committed to source control.
